hero.headline: Learn to Fly.
hero.subheadline: A good old-fashioned flight school at KCMA — one-on-one instruction, a fleet you actually want to fly, and a pace set by the student. Ventura County since 2009.

specialty.title: Paced to the Student. Not the Spreadsheet.
specialty.body: Big-box flight schools run on throughput. We run on relationships. Every student at CFI gets their instructor's cell number, a dispatch-ready airplane, and training that adapts to their life — not a conveyor belt of stage checks. The result: pilots who actually know how to fly.

items.title: Private Pilot
items.description: Your license to adventure. FAA Part 61 instruction paced to your schedule — not ours. Earn your ticket in a diverse fleet of Cessnas, Pipers, and Diamonds hangared on the field.

items.title: Instrument Rating
items.description: Turn weather from a showstopper into a strategy. Learn to fly the system, trust the gauges, and get the most out of your certificate — IFR ready in Southern California's busiest airspace.

items.title: Commercial & Beyond
items.description: Career-grade training from Commercial through CFI, CFII, and MEI. Complex and spin endorsements on site. The same instructors who helped you solo will sign you off to teach.

items.title: Flight Club 805
items.description: Members-only fleet access with 24/7 scheduling, priority booking, and discounted wet rates on every airplane we operate. Pay for the flying — not the hangar.

about.title: About CFI
about.paragraph1: Camarillo Flight Instruction opened in 2009 with one aircraft, one instructor, and one idea: build the flight school we wished existed. Sixteen years later we're still obsessed with the same thing — teaching people to fly, the right way.
about.paragraph2: Our fleet runs Cessna, Piper, and Diamond alongside an Elite simulator, all hangared at KCMA in the heart of Ventura County. Every aircraft is dispatch-ready. Every CFI is paid a living wage. Every student gets their instructor's cell number.

stats.subtitle: Private · Instrument · Commercial · CFI · CFII · MEI
stats.subtitleBody: Complex and spin endorsements on the field. Cessna, Piper, and Diamond aircraft plus an Elite simulator — all dispatch-ready.

stats.subtitle: 24/7 Fleet Access
stats.subtitleBody: A members-only aircraft club for pilots who want to keep flying after the checkride — discounted wet rates, priority scheduling, zero hangar overhead.

caseStudy.title: KCMA — Our Home Field
caseStudy.description: Camarillo Municipal sits in a rare sweet spot: uncongested pattern, reliable VFR weather nearly year-round, and direct access to Santa Barbara, the Channel Islands, and the LA basin. The 6,013' runway gives us room to teach — and a view of the Santa Monica Mountains that's hard to beat. Home to our
caseStudy.interactionHint: DRAG/MOVE MOUSE TO EXPLORE THE FIELD
